headline: Apple Eyes $50M Deals With News Giants For AI Tech Leap: NYT
summary: Apple is reportedly engaging in talks with news giants, proposing $50 million multi-year deals to license their content for training its generative AI systems, signaling a trend of tech companies collaborating with publishers to enhance their AI capabilities amidst concerns raised by the News Media Alliance over copyright issues.

headline: Staying Connected During The Holidays: Best Video Calling Apps And Devices For Christmas
